use_cases: Displaying user profile images in navigation headers and user menus
Showing avatar placeholders with fallback initials when images fail to load
Representing users in comment sections, chat interfaces, or user lists
Rendering customer or contact avatars in dashboard applications
Providing accessible user representation with semantic Radix UI primitives
ai_summary: A reusable Avatar component built with Radix UI primitives that displays circular user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a flat, minimalist aesthetic. The component includes Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback subcomponents for flexible composition. Ideal for user interfaces requiring accessible, production-ready avatar rendering in any SaaS, e-commerce, or dashboard application.
